name: e2e-tests
description: End-to-end tests for the Renku UI client

scripts.start: CYPRESS=1 BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000/ GATEWAY_URL=http://localhost:3000/api UISERVER_URL=http://localhost:3000/ui-server npm --prefix ../client run start:strict-port
scripts.client:preview: CYPRESS=1 BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000/ GATEWAY_URL=http://localhost:3000/api UISERVER_URL=http://localhost:3000/ui-server npm --prefix ../client run preview
scripts.start:coverage: CYPRESS=1 CYPRESS_COVERAGE=true BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000/ GATEWAY_URL=http://localhost:3000/api UISERVER_URL=http://localhost:3000/ui-server npm --prefix ../client run start:strict-port
scripts.client:preview:coverage: CYPRESS=1 CYPRESS_COVERAGE=true BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000/ GATEWAY_URL=http://localhost:3000/api UISERVER_URL=http://localhost:3000/ui-server npm --prefix ../client run preview
scripts.e2e:coverage: npm run coverage:clean && npm run client:build:coverage && start-server-and-test client:preview:coverage http://localhost:3000 cypress:headless
scripts.e2e:coverage:open: npm run coverage:clean && start-server-and-test start:coverage http://localhost:3000 cypress

author: Swiss Data Science Center
